findings.message: deno.json `license` field missing (must be `MIT` for alpha)
deno.json `description` missing
version is '0.1.0'; alpha cadence requires '0.0.1-alpha.0'
deno.json `publish.include` missing — `deno publish` ships everything by default and that leaks tests/scratch
deno.json `publish.exclude` should explicitly drop `**/*_test.ts`, `tests/`, `examples/`
deno.json compilerOptions.strict must be true
deno.json `tasks` missing `publish:dry-run` shortcut
exports["."] is './src/mod.ts' — convention is './mod.ts'
type 'MySqlConnectionConfig' uses non-standard suffix — convention is <Function>Options / <Noun>Spec
exported function 'inferCapabilities' uses non-standard prefix 'infer' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'convertDriverError' uses non-standard prefix 'convert' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'mapDriverError' uses non-standard prefix 'map' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'mapColumnType' uses non-standard prefix 'map' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'mapArg' uses non-standard prefix 'map' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'mapRow' uses non-standard prefix 'map' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'rowToArray' uses non-standard prefix 'row' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
README is 124 lines; minimum is 150
README missing 9/12 mandated sections (Overview, Quickstart, Mental model, API, Recipes, Configuration, Testing, Observability, Architecture, Stability, Compatibility, License)
no tests/ directory and no inline *_test.ts files — every package needs meaningful tests
mod.ts does not export an `inspect<Noun>()` diagnostic — recommended discoverability axis
